description.ko: 네온 불빛과 거센 비가 낭만적인 테크 누아르 도시 경관을 만들어내는 미래 대도시의 고공 조감도입니다.
description.en: A high-altitude look at a futuristic metropolis where neon light and heavy rain create a romantic, tech-noir cityscape.

prompt: A cinematic vertical bird's-eye view of NEON-V, titled 'The Rain-Slicked Sanctuary.' Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are draped in massive 3D holograms of koi fish pulsing in #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan. Heavy monsoon rain creates vibrant, distorted reflections on the wet metallic surfaces below. Flying maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails that cut through thick volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced reflections, 8k resolution, capturing a moody and romantic futuristic urban atmosphere.
